name_en: Bottega Veneta BVII New Color-Block Gemelli Bag. The Gemelli twin-bag silhouette is deeply loved, and now a color-block version has been released. New woven bag~ unique and high-end. The artistic weaving style showcases the charm of simplicity and luxury. Every style reveals a generous temperament. I'm falling more in love with the Bottega Veneta vibe!
